title: tococa erioneura
intro: Tococa erioneura is a plant species in the family Tococaceae, native to the Amazon rainforest. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly the bark and leaves, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tococa erioneura include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory and digestive issues. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the bark or leaves in hot water.
